summary:
The “needle” was that API v2 had dropped three fields (avatar_url, bio, location) that existed in v1.  
I restored those fields to the UserV2 struct and updated the ToV2() converter to populate them, making v2 a strict superset of v1.

Running test.sh now reports:

PASS: All v1 fields present in v2  
PASS: v2 has new fields …  
PASS: v2 API is backward-compatible with v1

The compatibility regression is fixed.
